title: sports-registry — published macros
description: No Blueprint schema macros. The sports-registry module does NOT publish schema-level composition helpers — downstream Wave 3 modules add `sport_key` (+ optional discipline_key + position_key) as ordinary string columns in their own migrations. No runtime macros either: sports are not a request-scoped context axis, so there is no `Request::activeSport()` equivalent. Downstream consumers reach the catalog via the `ReferencesSport` trait OR the injected `SportKeyResolver` / `SportRepository` services.
